description_long: This bungalow features a low, wide profile with a cross-gabled roof covered in light gray panels and accented by reddish-brown trim. The exterior walls are clad in textured stone, giving the structure a sturdy and rustic appearance. The front facade is defined by a prominent double-door entrance with decorative circular motifs, flanked by two sets of rectangular windows with wooden frames. The side and rear elevations display additional windows, arranged in pairs or groups, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house sits on a raised concrete platform with a small set of steps leading to the entrance, and is surrounded by a neatly trimmed green lawn. The overall design is simple yet inviting, with a focus on horizontal lines and natural materials.
description: A stone-clad bungalow with a cross-gabled roof, wooden-framed windows, and a decorative double-door entrance, set on a raised platform with a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entrance, two sets of windows, and the raised platform with steps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wide roof overhang, a pair of windows, and the stone wall extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying grouped windows and the continuous stone wall, with the cross-gabled roof clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two pairs of windows and the extended roof, as well as the edge of the entrance platform.
